rationale: The current best run already gets most of its gain from late projection EMA plus late quant-aware snaps. This variant keeps that path but narrows the EMA target set to `mlp.proj.weight`, which should preserve the quantization-smoothing benefit on the heaviest-tailed projection family while avoiding extra averaging on attention output projections that are more routing-sensitive. The change is small, compounds cleanly with the current best script, and stays inside the 1500-line limit.
title: MLP-Only Projection EMA Finalizer
